author: Haakon Wibe
description: Prefer IPv4 over IPv6 - Required for Microsoft Global Secure Access
notes: Sets DisabledComponents to 0x20 (32) which prefers IPv4 over IPv6
This is recommended for Global Secure Access (Entra Private Access / Internet Access)
A reboot may be required for changes to take effect

settings.name: Prefer IPv4 over IPv6
settings.description: Configure Windows to prefer IPv4 connections over IPv6
